style: HD painterly Austin dusk parallax backdrop; sprite gameplay remains pixel-readable
notes: Backdrops are authored at 2x physical resolution and rendered with canvas smoothing.
Layer dimensions are intentionally wider than the viewport for parallax tiling.
Austin cues: Frost Bank crown, Capitol dome, UT Tower, Congress bridge bats, Lady Bird Lake, live oaks, SOCO/food-truck/neon details.
This is an original illustration pass, not a direct Celeste clone.
